## 3. Scan Tool Health

- Qualys VMDR: 99.9% uptime (5 minutes planned maintenance Nov 20)
- AWS Inspector: 100% uptime

## 4. Assets Not Discovered (18 assets)

- 10 corporate workstations offline (travel/remote workers)
- 5 staging instances (ephemeral containers terminated between CMDB sync and scan)
- 3 development instances (powered off during non-business hours scan window)

## 5. Authentication Metrics

22 authentication failures out of 962 discovered assets (2.3%):
- 15 corporate workstations with stopped local scan agent
- 5 staging instances with Vault credential sync delay
- 2 network devices with TACACS+ timeout (resolved mid-October)
